description_long: This is a rustic cabin complex nestled within a dense forest of snow-covered evergreen trees. The main structure features a dark, gabled roof with visible wooden siding and a smaller adjoining building, both surrounded by a thick cluster of trees. The roofs are steeply pitched, likely to shed snow, and the buildings are set back from the forest edge, creating a secluded atmosphere. Windows are visible on the main cabin, arranged asymmetrically, and a small porch or entryway is present at the front. The forest is dense, with trees of varying heights and a snowy ground cover, enhancing the sense of isolation. The overall scene evokes a tranquil, wintery retreat, with the cabins blending harmoniously into their natural surroundings.
description: A rustic, snow-covered cabin complex with steep gabled roofs, surrounded by dense evergreen forest. The main cabin features wooden siding, asymmetrical windows, and a small porch entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cabin, its adjoining structure, and the entry porch, all nestled within dense, snow-covered trees.
description_view_1: Rear view with the cabins partially obscured by the thick forest, only the rooftops are clearly visible among the trees.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the main cabin's gabled roof and the dense tree coverage, with the smaller structure less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabins from behind, with rooftops and some windows visible through the snowy trees.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with overhangs, covered in dark material, suitable for snowy conditions
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small to medium-sized rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed on the visible facades, with some grouped and others isolated
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade of the main cabin, adjacent to the porch structure
